name: 1847 Holdings LLC
business: The construction business designs, builds, and installs doors, trim, millwork, custom cabinetry, and countertops for commercial, government, hospitality, and residential customers. The automotive supplies business designs and sells vehicle horns, warning lights, sirens, back-up alarms, and accessories for the aftermarket and industrial markets.
sellsTo: homebuilders and homeowners of single-family homes

exposures.sentence: Our business primarily relies on U.S. home improvement, repair and remodel and new home construction activity levels in the United States.
We design and sell a broad range of branded vehicle horns, warning lights, sirens, back-up alarms and accessories.
We sell our products to big-box national retail chains, through specialty and industrial distributors, as well as online/mail order retailers and original equipment manufacturers.
